items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 现在有了 TurboTax 连接器，可以直接在终端中处理报税事务。Thariq 调侃说庆幸自己一直拖着没报税。
items.content_en: Claude Code now has a TurboTax connector, letting you handle tax filing right from the terminal. Thariq jokes he's glad he procrastinated on his taxes.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Vercel Sandbox 成为最快的基于 microVM 的沙箱环境。无论是 OpenClaw、coding agent 还是并行计算，Vercel 认为这是新世界的基础设施。客户迁移反馈显示其真实场景下的性能和可靠性无可匹敌。
items.content_en: Vercel Sandbox is now the fastest microVM-based sandbox. Whether for OpenClaw, coding agents, or compute parallelism, Vercel sees this as the foundation of the new world. Customer migration feedback confirms unmatched real-world performance and reliability.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 用数据中心资本支出图表说明 AI 需求的规模：亚马逊过去 3 年的资本支出超过了此前全部历史。当前大部分 AI 使用集中在 token 效率较高的聊天工具上，但 coding agent 的 token 消耗量高出数个数量级，而这种模式即将扩展到所有知识工作领域。
items.content_en: Levie uses datacenter capex charts to illustrate AI demand scale: Amazon's capex in the last 3 years exceeds its entire history. Most AI usage today is token-efficient chat tools, but coding agents consume orders of magnitude more tokens and this pattern is about to hit all knowledge work.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 提出反直觉观点：AI 时代律师会更多而非更少。原因有三：AI 让更多人能提出法律问题从而需要真人律师验证执行；AI 产生大量新型法律条款需要审核；AI 本身在各行业带来全新的法律领域（IP、合规、监管）。
items.content_en: Levie makes a counterintuitive argument: AI will create more lawyers, not fewer. Three reasons: AI enables more people to ask legal questions requiring human verification; AI generates exotic new legal terms needing review; and AI itself creates entirely new areas of law (IP, compliance, regulation) across every industry.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 在开源 3 个月、每天被数万 agentic 工程师使用后，提出「Thin Harness, Fat Skills」架构哲学：harness 应该是薄薄的导体，只负责读取文件；memory 是 markdown，skills 是 markdown，brain 是 git repo。如果你的 harness 死了记忆就丢失，说明你的 harness 建得太厚了。
items.content_en: After 3 months of open source used by tens of thousands of agentic engineers daily, Garry Tan proposes the 'Thin Harness, Fat Skills' architecture: the harness should be a thin conductor that reads files, not owns them. Memory is markdown, skills are markdown, brain is a git repo. If your memory dies when your harness dies, you built it too thick.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 分享了通过与 Claw 聊天学习语音系统延迟和构建知识的体验，展示了 AI agent 作为教育工具的强大潜力。
items.content_en: Garry Tan shares how chatting with the Claw provided a powerful education on voice system latency and architecture, demonstrating AI agents' potential as learning tools.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Podcast host
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 引用观点：AI 客服领域的供应商数量已经多到可以认为这是一个「已解决的问题」，暗示该赛道竞争已经饱和。
items.content_en: Matt Turck shares the take that there are so many AI customer service vendors that it's 'basically a solved problem' — signaling the space is saturated with competition.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 提出 AI 时代人类沟通的三大核心用途：决定做什么以及「好」的标准是什么、陪伴彼此防止孤独和建立同志情谊、创意头脑风暴。项目同步、状态更新、交接等任务将由 agent 接管。同时指出最高效的人类协作方式是「不协作」——一个人端到端负责，配合 agent 工作。
items.content_en: Zara argues human communication in the AI era serves three core purposes: deciding what to work on and what 'good' looks like, keeping each other company to prevent loneliness, and creative brainstorming. Project syncs, status updates, and handovers will be handled by agents. Also proposes the most efficient collaboration is 'don't collaborate' — one person owns things end-to-end, working with agents.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 批评了 VC 行业的「markup 文化」：同一个 VC 先以低估值投资口头承诺长期陪跑，6 个月后却催促创始人接受最高估值以向 LP 展示 markup。提醒创始人远离只关心账面回报的投资人。
items.content_en: Nikunj critiques VC 'markup culture': the same VC who pushed for a low valuation citing long-term conviction, 6 months later pushes for the highest valuation to show marks to LPs. Warns founders to avoid VCs who only care about paper markups.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Steinberger 发布 OpenClaw 重大更新：harness 现在可以作为插件替换，意味着可以轻松将默认 Pi harness 替换为 Anthropic SDK 或自定义实现。同时推出两个实验性功能：1）Strict Mode 强制 GPT-5.x 持续工作而非停在「这是计划」；2）原生 Codex 作为 OpenClaw harness，让 Codex 接管线程管理、恢复和压缩。
items.content_en: Steinberger announces a major OpenClaw update: harnesses can now be plugins, making it trivial to swap the default Pi harness for Anthropic's SDK or custom implementations. Also introduces two experiments: 1) Strict Mode forcing GPT-5.x to keep working instead of stopping at 'here's the plan'; 2) Native Codex as OpenClaw harness, letting Codex own threads, resume, compaction, and app-server execution.

items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.bio: South Park Commons GP, ex-Dropbox CTO
items.content_zh: Agarwal 指出真正的「agent」与简单的 LLM 循环或事件触发之间的核心区别在于：智能的长时间记忆管理。Claude Code 架构中最有趣的部分正是其三层记忆架构。
items.content_en: Agarwal identifies the key difference between a true 'agent' and simply running an LLM in a loop: intelligent long-horizon memory management. The most interesting aspect of Claude Code's architecture is its 3-tier memory system.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 推出全新 /ultraplan 功能：Claude 在 Web 端为你构建完整的实现计划，你可以阅读和编辑，然后在 Web 端或本地终端执行。核心洞察是：实现需要本地环境和交互性，但规划可以在云端完成，因为主要是读代码和理解意图。所有启用了 CC Web 的用户均可预览使用。
items.content_en: Claude Code launches /ultraplan: Claude builds a full implementation plan on the web that you can read, edit, then execute on the web or back in your terminal. Key insight: implementation requires a local environment and interactivity, but planning can happen in the cloud since it's mostly about reading code and understanding intent. Available now in preview for all CC web users.

items.author: Claude
items.content_zh: Claude for Word 正式进入 Beta：直接在侧边栏中起草、编辑和修改文档，保留原始格式，修改以追踪更改形式呈现。更重要的是，Claude for Word 与 Excel 和 PowerPoint 共享上下文，可以在一次对话中跨文档协作。Team 和 Enterprise 计划可用。
items.content_en: Claude for Word enters beta: draft, edit, and revise documents directly from the sidebar, preserving formatting with edits appearing as tracked changes. Crucially, Claude for Word shares context with Excel and PowerPoint, enabling cross-document collaboration in a single conversation. Available on Team and Enterprise plans.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Altman 发表了一篇他犹豫是否发布的长文（获得 9000+ 点赞），引发广泛关注和讨论。
items.content_en: Altman published a deeply personal essay he almost didn't release, generating massive engagement (9,000+ likes) and widespread discussion.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 与 20 位企业 CIO 交流后发现：如果你的软件没有好的 headless 模式，未来几年将面临风险。银行、媒体、医疗等行业的 IT 领导一致表示 3-5 年内不会保留没有好 API 的供应商。在 agent 数量远超人类用户的世界里，软件平台必须同时通过 agent 和自有界面提供价值。
items.content_en: Levie reports that after meeting 20 enterprise CIOs across banking, media, and healthcare, the message is clear: software without a great headless mode is at risk. IT leaders unanimously say they won't keep vendors without good APIs in 3-5 years. In a world with 100x more agents than human users, platforms must deliver value through agents as much as their own interfaces.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.bio: Product at Roblox, AI newsletter author
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 分享了对中国 AI 工作文化的观察：普遍晚上 11 点到 11 点工作制、年轻化团队、全民翻墙用 Claude Code 等美国 AI 工具、政府大力支持 AI 创业并鼓励一人公司（OPC）模式。北京是主要 AI 中心。
items.content_en: Peter Yang shares observations on Chinese AI work culture: common 11am-11pm schedules, young workforce, everyone using US AI tools like Claude Code via VPN, government actively supporting AI startups with subsidies and encouraging one-person companies (OPC). Beijing is the main AI hub.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Podcast host
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 发布了与 Anthropic 的 Felix Rieseberg 的深度对话，涵盖 Claude Mythos 预览的「step-function change」、Cowork 的 10 天构建故事、为什么本地计算机仍然被低估、AI agent 中 UX 和信任的意义，以及 SaaS 末日论。Felix 认为我们仍处于 AI 的早期阶段，相当于诺基亚 3320 时代。
items.content_en: Matt Turck releases a deep conversation with Anthropic's Felix Rieseberg covering the Claude Mythos preview as a 'step-function change', Cowork's 10-day build story, why the local computer is underappreciated, what UX and trust mean for AI agents, and the SaaSpocalypse thesis. Felix believes we're still in AI's early days — the Nokia 3320 era, not the iPhone era yet.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 提出不要只让 AI「总结」长内容，而是尝试更高级的 prompt：remix 成精致杂志文章、苏格拉底式对话、或基于你的兴趣挑选最有价值的洞察。同时强调要真正理解 AI 能力，几乎必须成为一个 builder——Learn to build, Build to learn。
items.content_en: Zara argues against simple AI 'summarize' prompts — try remixing content into polished magazine articles, Socratic dialogues, or personalized insight extraction instead. Also emphasizes that to truly understand AI capabilities, you almost have to become a builder — Learn to build, Build to learn.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Steinberger 的 X 账户被恢复后发出感谢，同时发出社区号召：WhatsApp CLI 项目需要贡献者帮助，他目前无暇顾及。两条推文分别获得 945 和 964 个赞，展现了 OpenClaw 社区的凝聚力。
items.content_en: Steinberger's X account was reinstated and he thanked the community. Also put out a call for contributors to help with the WhatsApp CLI project, which he can't focus on right now. Both tweets got 900+ likes, showing the strength of the OpenClaw community.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 感谢开源社区对 GBrain 的贡献，同时坦言目前 OpenClaw + GBrain + LLM Knowledge Wiki 与手机的集成体验仍然令人沮丧——我们正处于 AI agent 的 Altair BASIC 时代。展示了 GStack 技能 /plan-DevEx-review 中的开发者体验同理心测试。
items.content_en: Garry Tan thanks OSS contributors making GBrain better, while candidly acknowledging the frustrating setup experience of OpenClaw + GBrain + LLM Knowledge Wiki on phones — we're in the Altair BASIC era of AI agents. Showcased the Developer Experience Empathy Test from GStack's /plan-DevEx-review skill.

items.author: Amjad Masad
items.content_zh: Masad 回顾两年前他预言 AI 末日论「理性主义」意识形态最终会导致暴力，如今 Sam Altman 燃烧瓶袭击者似乎正是这类社区的参与者，印证了他的判断。同时指出中国开源模型和欧洲平台监管可能成为美国自由企业的希望。
items.content_en: Masad recalls his two-year-old prediction that AI doomer 'rationalist' ideology would lead to violence — the alleged Molotov attacker targeting Sam Altman appears to be from those communities, validating his concern. Also notes that China's open models and European regulation may become the hope for free American enterprise.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Rauch 暗示 OpenClaw（🦞）与 Vercel（▲）的合作，发布了神秘的联名预告。
items.content_en: Rauch teases a collaboration between OpenClaw (🦞) and Vercel (▲) with a cryptic announcement post.

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Every 公司推出首个使用 Claude Managed Agents 构建的应用 @TrySpiral，标志着 Every 在 AI agent 产品化方面的又一步进展。
items.content_en: Every launches its first app built with Claude Managed Agents — @TrySpiral — marking another step in Every's push toward AI agent product development.

items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.bio: South Park Commons GP, ex-Dropbox CTO
items.content_zh: Agarwal 感叹「免费」软件的深远影响：不喜欢界面？立刻设计并推送新版本。性能慢？自动重构数据层并优化性能。软件开发的边际成本正在趋近于零，这对 SaaS 模式是根本性的挑战。
items.content_en: Agarwal reflects on the mind-bending implications of 'free' software: don't like an interface? Design and push a new one immediately. Performance slow? Auto-refactor the data layer. The marginal cost of software development is approaching zero — a fundamental challenge to the SaaS model.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 分享了转型 VC 两年来的 11 条核心经验，包括：上飞机别犹豫、交易常在周末死掉、没到账就没成交、信念不来自数据室、早期投资在创始人/市场/产品中选两个然后相信第三个会跟上。同时指出最优秀的创始人能以极清晰的方式论证问题的正反两面。
items.content_en: Nikunj shares 11 hard-won lessons from two years as a VC: get on the flight, deals die on weekends, if it's not wired it's not done, conviction is never found in the data room, and in early stage pick two of founder/market/product and believe the third catches up. Also notes the best founders can argue both sides of any argument with extreme clarity.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.bio: Product at Roblox, AI newsletter author
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 预告了与 Figma CEO Dylan Field 的深度对话，探讨 AI 能否学习「设计品味」、设计系统是否限制创造力、以及 Figma 如何在 AI 时代竞争等核心问题。
items.content_en: Peter Yang previews a deep conversation with Figma CEO Dylan Field, exploring whether AI can learn design taste, whether design systems constrain creativity, and how Figma plans to compete in the AI era.

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 分享了她很少用 AI 写作的原因：她享受写作过程且写作能力很强，用 AI 反而更耗时间，因为需要不断修改才能达到她的高标准。同时展示了用 AI 生成的 Karpathy 知识管理体系解析 deck。
items.content_en: Zara shares why she rarely uses AI for writing: she enjoys writing and finds it easy, so using AI actually takes more time since her high standards require extensive editing. Also showcased an AI-generated deck explaining Karpathy's knowledge management system.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 的 Monitor Tool 功能极其强大——可以让 Claude 启动开发服务器并实时监控错误。同时 Thariq 认为「prompting」将持续成为极高杠杆的技能，如同写作和演讲一样，是人与 agent 之间沟通带宽的关键。
items.content_en: Claude Code's Monitor Tool is extremely powerful — it lets Claude start a dev server and observe for errors in real time. Thariq also argues 'prompting' will remain an incredibly high-leverage skill, like writing or public speaking — it's the key to growing bandwidth between humans and agents.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Steinberger 找到了 GitHub MCP Server 的开发者（引发社区热议），并持续推动 OpenClaw 社区建设，同时开设 ClosedClaw 问答环节。
items.content_en: Steinberger tracked down the developer who built the GitHub MCP Server (sparking major community buzz), while continuing to drive OpenClaw community building and hosting a ClosedClaw Q&A session.

items.author: Sam Altman
items.content_zh: Altman 宣布 Codex 受到大量好评，OpenAI 将应用户强烈需求推出 100 美元的 ChatGPT Pro 订阅层级。
items.content_en: Altman announces Codex is getting massive love, and OpenAI will launch a $100 ChatGPT Pro tier by popular demand.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Rauch 提出「Agentic Infrastructure 是云的未来」：从服务开发者转向服务 coding agent，从页面部署转向 agent 部署。shadcn init 现在每秒执行一次，展示了新一代软件创建的规模。
items.content_en: Rauch declares 'Agentic Infrastructure is the future of the cloud' — shifting from serving developers to serving coding agents, from deploying pages to deploying agents. shadcn init now runs once per second, showing the scale of new software creation.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.content_zh: Peter Yang 分享了对 AI 工具体验的微妙观察：Opus 在 OpenClaw 上无可替代，但用 Claude Code 做个人助理总感觉不够「属于自己」。同时调侃「Hermes Agent 是 OpenClaw 的奢侈品版本吗？」
items.content_en: Peter Yang shares a nuanced take on AI tool experience: no model is anywhere near as good as Opus for OpenClaw, but using Claude Code as a personal assistant replacement just doesn't feel as 'mine' as OpenClaw. Also quips: 'Is Hermes Agent the luxury bag version of OpenClaw?'

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 认为大家严重低估了「不像软件的领域」对软件和自动化的总需求。AI 采用呈现两极分化：大多数用户还在用聊天工具，另一端的人已经在部署长期运行的 agent 执行真正的工作。同时他强调 prompting 就像给新同事清晰指令一样不可或缺。
items.content_en: Levie argues everyone is substantially underestimating total demand for software in areas that don't 'feel like software.' AI adoption is a tale of two cities: most users interact via chat, while others deploy long-running agents producing real work. He also emphasizes prompting is as essential as giving clear instructions to a new colleague.

items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.bio: AI researcher, ex-Tesla AI Director, OpenAI founding team
items.content_zh: Karpathy 指出当前大众对 AI 能力的理解存在巨大鸿沟：很多人还停留在去年免费版 ChatGPT 的印象里，而前沿模型的能力已经质变。OpenClaw 的爆发正是因为第一次让大量非技术用户真正体验到了最新 agentic 模型的能力。
items.content_en: Karpathy highlights a growing gap in public understanding of AI capability: many people's views are stuck on last year's free-tier ChatGPT, while frontier models have leaped ahead. The OpenClaw moment was so big because it was the first time a large group of non-technical users truly experienced the latest agentic models.

items.author: Josh Woodward
items.content_zh: Google 的 Lyria 3 音乐模型在不到 50 天内已生成超过 1 亿首歌曲。为庆祝这一里程碑，Gemini App 向所有用户免费开放完整音乐生成能力。
items.content_en: Google's Lyria 3 music model has generated over 100 million songs in under 50 days. To celebrate, Gemini App is unlocking full music generation power for all users for free.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 开源了 GBrain——让 OpenClaw 和 Hermes Agent 拥有对 1 万多个 markdown 文件的完美全记忆能力，MIT 许可，帮助用户构建自己的 mini-AGI。
items.content_en: Garry Tan open-sourced GBrain — giving OpenClaw and Hermes Agent perfect total recall over 10,000+ markdown files. MIT-licensed, designed to help users build their own mini-AGI.

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Dan Shipper 分享了 Sonnet「phone a friend」调用 Opus 的功能评价，称这是非常实用的特性。同时为对 AI 发展感到焦虑的人制作了一段安抚视频。
items.content_en: Dan Shipper highlights the Sonnet 'phone a friend' Opus feature as very useful. Also released a calming video for people still freaking out about AI developments.

items.author: Claude
items.content_zh: Claude 平台正式推出 Advisor Tool（beta）：在 Messages API 调用中添加 advisor 工具，Sonnet/Haiku agent 在运行中遇到难点时自动咨询 Opus，获取计划后继续执行，全程在单个 API 请求中完成。
items.content_en: Claude Platform launches Advisor Tool in beta: add the advisor tool to your Messages API call, and when your Sonnet or Haiku agent hits a hard decision mid-run, it consults Opus, gets a plan, and continues — all within a single API request.

items.author: Cat Wu
items.content_zh: Anthropic 大幅简化了 Claude Code 在 AWS Bedrock 和 Google Vertex 上的配置流程，降低企业接入门槛。
items.content_en: Anthropic made setting up Claude Code with AWS Bedrock and Google Vertex much faster, lowering the barrier for enterprise adoption.

items.author: Alex Albert
items.content_zh: Anthropic 推出「Advisor」机制：让 Sonnet 在遇到难题时可以「打电话给朋友」——调用 Opus 获取建议。在 SWE-bench 多语言评测中，Sonnet + Opus Advisor 比纯 Sonnet 高 2.7 个百分点，同时每任务成本降低 11.9%。
items.content_en: Anthropic introduces the 'Advisor' mechanism: Sonnet can 'phone a friend' by calling Opus when facing hard decisions. On SWE-bench Multilingual, Sonnet with Opus advisor scored 2.7 points higher than Sonnet alone while costing 11.9% less per task.

items.author: Swyx
items.bio: AI Engineer founder, Latent Space podcast
items.content_zh: Swyx 在 AI Engineer 大会上分享了「AGI Pill」药瓶的幕后故事——这个灵感来自一条推文，药瓶在现场被秒抢，反映了 AI 社区文化正在形成独特的 meme 和仪式感。
items.content_en: Swyx shares the backstory behind the 'AGI Pill' bottles at the AI Engineer conference — inspired by a tweet, the bottles got snapped up instantly, reflecting how the AI community is developing its own unique memes and rituals.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Landscape author
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 观察到数据库领域的残酷洗牌：SurrealDB 超越 EdgeDB，EdgeDB 超越 MongoDB，新一代数据库正在快速重新排序市场格局。
items.content_en: Matt Turck observes the database landscape reshuffling: SurrealDB overtaking EdgeDB, EdgeDB overtaking MongoDB — the next-gen database market is rapidly reordering.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 发现 AI 检测工具 Pangram Labs 将他手写的内容误判为「100% AI 生成垃圾」，引发思考：当 AI 检测不可靠时，人类创作者的原创性如何被证明？同时庆祝自己的开源副项目获得 80 个 star。
items.content_en: Nikunj discovers AI detection tool Pangram Labs flagged his hand-written content as '100% AI generated slop' — raising questions about how human creators prove originality when AI detection is unreliable. Also celebrates his open-source side project hitting 80 stars.

items.author: The MAD Podcast (Matt Turck × Felix Rieseberg)
items.bio: MAD Podcast host × Anthropic Cowork Engineering Lead
items.content_zh: 深度对谈 Anthropic 的 Felix Rieseberg：Claude Mythos 是一个真正的「阶跃式变化」，模型在网络安全方面展现出超强能力；Cowork 的诞生源于非技术用户对 Claude Code 的巨大潜在需求——人们为了使用它「爬过碎玻璃」；本地计算机被严重低估；执行成本趋零后，品味（taste）成为关键瓶颈；AI 正处于诺基亚 3320 时代，iPhone 时刻尚未到来。Felix 建议创业者关注两个方向：运行在老旧 Windows 7 设备上的长尾行业软件，以及将 AI 推向物理世界。
items.content_en: Deep conversation with Anthropic's Felix Rieseberg: Claude Mythos is a genuine 'step-function change' with outsized cybersecurity capabilities; Cowork was born from overwhelming latent demand from non-technical users 'crawling over glass' to use Claude Code; the local computer is underappreciated; with execution costs approaching zero, taste becomes the key bottleneck; we're in AI's Nokia 3320 era — the iPhone moment hasn't arrived. Felix advises founders to explore two areas: long-tail legacy software on old Windows 7 devices, and pushing AI into the physical world.

items.author: Unsupervised Learning (Redpoint AI)
items.bio: AI podcast by Jacob Efron, Redpoint
items.content_zh: 专访 OpenAI 首席科学家 Jakub Pachocki：讨论了 AI 研究助理能力的时间线（9月达到研究实习生水平），Codex 已成为 OpenAI 内部主要编程工具；数学/物理突破作为模型智能的关键衡量标准；持续学习是核心方向而非被忽视的问题；对齐的长期挑战在于价值观的泛化；以及 RL 在代码之外领域的巨大潜力。
items.content_en: Interview with OpenAI Chief Scientist Jakub Pachocki: discussed timelines for AI research intern capabilities by September; Codex is now OpenAI's primary coding tool internally; math/physics breakthroughs serve as key intelligence benchmarks; continual learning is the core direction, not an ignored problem; the long-term alignment challenge is about value generalization; and RL's massive potential beyond code domains.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: 计划做直播，帮助非技术人员使用 Claude Code 改善工作流程。核心观点：只需要几个小技巧，就能让非技术用户大幅提升效率。Claude Code 的文档本身就是一座金矿。
items.content_en: Planning livestreams to help non-technical people use Claude Code to improve their workflows. Key insight: just a few tips can unlock massive productivity gains for non-technical users. The Claude Code docs are a gold mine.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: 在做 AI 角色评估时发现，Claude 在有模型名的盲测中总是把自己排第一。解决方法：移除模型名称做匿名评测。同时指出一个矛盾现实：我们既需要强大的本地模型，但即使顶级模型仍然被用户抱怨不够好、会犯错。
items.content_en: While building character evals, found Claude constantly ranks itself #1 when model names are visible — fixed by anonymizing. Also highlights a paradox: we want powerful local models, yet even top-tier models get constant complaints about mistakes.

items.author: Peter Yang
items.content_zh: 深度分析 AI 订阅模式的可持续性：Claude Max、ChatGPT Pro 等无限量订阅可能不会持续太久。Anthropic 已经限制了 OpenClaw 的访问，暗示「全包」模式的经济模型正在受到挑战。
items.content_en: Deep analysis on AI subscription sustainability: all-you-can-use plans like Claude Max and ChatGPT Pro may not last. Anthropic already cut back OpenClaw access, signaling the economics of 'unlimited' AI are being challenged.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: 受 Karpathy 启发，推出开源项目 LLMwiki——用 Opus 4.5 全程 vibe coded。输入包括推文、书签、iMessage/WhatsApp 对话和个人写作，打造个人知识维基。体现了「File over App」的理念。
items.content_en: Inspired by Karpathy, launched open-source LLMwiki — fully vibe coded with Opus 4.5. Inputs include tweets, bookmarks, iMessage/WhatsApp, and personal writing to build a personal knowledge wiki. Embodies the 'File over App' philosophy.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: 知识工作的后台 agent 时代已经来临。通过 Box API 或 MCP，可以用 Claude Managed Agents 自动化任何内容工作流——文档审核、合规检查、内容提取，两分钟就能跑起来。
items.content_en: Background agents for knowledge work are here. Using Box API or MCP with Claude Managed Agents, you can automate any content workflow — document review, compliance checks, content extraction — up and running in 2 minutes.

items.author: Kevin Weil
items.content_zh: OpenAI 的模型一次性解决了五个 Erdos 数学难题，而且随着模型能力提升，证明过程越来越优雅。AI 数学推理能力正在快速突破。
items.content_en: OpenAI's models solved five Erdos math problems at once, with proofs getting more elegant as models improve. AI mathematical reasoning is advancing rapidly.

items.author: Josh Woodward
items.content_zh: Gemini 推出 Notebooks 功能，将 NotebookLM 的核心能力直接集成到 Gemini App 中。不再是简单的「项目管理」，而是构建真正的「第二大脑」——把笔记、搜索和 AI 推理融为一体。
items.content_en: Gemini launches Notebooks, integrating NotebookLM's core magic directly into the Gemini App. Moving beyond basic 'projects' to build a true 'second brain' — fusing notes, search, and AI reasoning into one seamless experience.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: 推崇「10x 工程师」理念——如果你还在听 1x 速度工程师的建议，那就落后了。同时分享了 markdown + agent 技能触发的工作流：agent 可以根据上下文自动判断何时需要触发特定技能。
items.content_en: Champions the '10x engineer' ethos — if you're taking advice from 1x speed engineers, you're falling behind. Also shared how markdown + agent skill triggering works: agents automatically decide when to invoke specific capabilities based on context.

items.author: Claude
items.content_zh: Anthropic 正式推出 Managed Agents：开发者可以通过 Claude Console、Claude Code 或全新 CLI 构建和部署 agent。Sentry 已基于 Managed Agents 实现从根因分析到自动修复 PR 的全流程集成。
items.content_en: Anthropic launches Managed Agents: developers can build and deploy agents through Claude Console, Claude Code, or the new CLI. Sentry already built an integration that goes from root-cause analysis to automated fix PRs.

items.author: Amjad Masad
items.content_zh: Replit 正在加速个人创业者的崛起——通过给 builder 提供完整的「虚拟团队」能力，单人 bootstrapped 业务增长明显加快。Solo builder 时代正在到来。
items.content_en: Replit is accelerating the rise of solo entrepreneurs — giving builders entire virtual teams. Bootstrapped solo businesses are growing faster than ever. The solo builder era is here.

items.author: Alex Albert
items.content_zh: Managed Agents 既是最快速搭建周末 agent 项目的方式，也是最稳健地将 agent 推向百万用户的方案。它消除了自托管 agent 基础设施的所有复杂性——sandbox、状态管理、凭证管理全部内置。
items.content_en: Managed Agents is somehow both the fastest way to hack together a weekend agent project and the most robust way to ship one to millions of users. It eliminates all the complexity of self-hosting agent infrastructure — sandboxing, state management, and credentials all built in.

items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.content_zh: 「先塑造工具，然后工具塑造你」——SPC 整个团队现在每周都在写代码，而两个月前只有 1-2 人写代码。AI 编程工具正在让非工程师也成为 builder。
items.content_en: 'First you shape the tools, then the tools shape you.' At SPC, the entire team now writes code weekly — two months ago only 1-2 people coded. AI coding tools are turning non-engineers into builders.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Landscape author
items.content_zh: 当调查记者 John Carreyrou（揭露 Theranos 骗局的人）声称找到了中本聪的真实身份，却没人关注时，你就知道加密货币正在深度寒冬中。
items.content_en: When John Carreyrou — the journalist who exposed Theranos — claims to have figured out who Satoshi is and no one on your timeline cares, you know it's a deep crypto winter.

items.author: No Priors (Sarah Guo × Elad Gil × Jeremy Allaire)
items.content_zh: No Priors 播客专访 Circle 联合创始人兼 CEO Jeremy Allaire，深入探讨 AI agent 如何重塑金融系统。核心话题包括：稳定币作为互联网美元协议的愿景、USDC 的 600 亿美元规模、AI agent 需要原生数字货币进行自主交易、区块链作为 agent 经济的结算层、以及监管框架如何适应 agentic 支付的未来。Allaire 认为未来几年将有数十亿 AI agent 在区块链上进行经济活动。
items.content_en: No Priors interviews Circle co-founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire on how AI agents will transform the financial system. Key topics: the vision of stablecoins as an internet dollar protocol, USDC's $60B scale, why AI agents need native digital currency for autonomous transactions, blockchain as the settlement layer for the agentic economy, and how regulation must adapt to agentic payments. Allaire predicts billions of AI agents conducting economic activity on blockchain within years.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: 提出 Web 的黄金时代即将到来：LLM 天然精通 Web 技术，浏览器正在成为每个人的 IDE，没有 App Store 的限制。同时推出 AI Gateway 产品：零停机、无锁定、免密钥、数据不用于训练。
items.content_en: Argues the web's brightest days are ahead: LLMs are proficient in web tech, the browser is everyone's IDE, no App Store gatekeeping. Also launched AI Gateway — zero downtime, no lock-in, no keys, no training on your data.

items.author: AI & I by Every
items.content_zh: 本期深入探讨 Every 公司如何为全部 25 名员工配备个人 AI agent（OpenClaw）。核心发现：当每个人都有专属 agent 后，工作模式从「人做事」变成「人指挥 agent 做事」。Agent 会学习每个人的风格和偏好，在 Slack 等平台自主执行任务。团队成员开始互相学习对方 agent 的能力，形成了一种全新的协作模式。
items.content_en: Deep dive into how Every equipped all 25 employees with personal AI agents (OpenClaws). Key finding: when everyone has a dedicated agent, work shifts from 'people doing tasks' to 'people directing agents.' Agents learn individual styles and preferences, autonomously executing tasks across Slack and other platforms. Team members started learning from each other's agents, creating an entirely new collaboration model.

items.author: Dan Shipper
items.content_zh: Every 公司 25 名全职员工全部使用 OpenClaw（个人 AI agent）工作，是全球少数完全实践「人人有 agent」模式的公司之一。每个员工的 AI 人格化 agent 可以自我进化，在 Slack 等平台代表个人风格工作。
items.content_en: Every's 25 full-time employees all work with OpenClaws — personal AI agents. They're among the few companies practicing the 'everyone has an agent' model at scale. Each employee's personalized agent evolves and works across Slack representing their style.

items.author: Claude Blog
items.content_zh: Claude 正式发布 Managed Agents 产品：从 prompt 到生产部署提速 10 倍。开发者无需自建 agent 运行时，两行代码即可部署生产级 agent。支持通过 Console、Claude Code 和 CLI 三种方式构建。
items.content_en: Claude officially launches Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster. Developers can deploy production-grade agents in two lines of code without building their own runtime. Available through Console, Claude Code, and CLI.

items.author: Anthropic Engineering
items.content_zh: Anthropic 工程团队详解 Managed Agents 的架构设计：核心理念是将「大脑」（LLM 推理）与「双手」（工具执行）解耦。通过独立的沙箱执行环境，实现了状态持久化、凭证隔离和自动扩缩容。这种架构让开发者可以专注于 agent 逻辑，而不用操心基础设施。
items.content_en: Anthropic engineering deep dive on Managed Agents architecture: the core principle is decoupling the 'brain' (LLM reasoning) from the 'hands' (tool execution). Independent sandboxed execution environments enable state persistence, credential isolation, and auto-scaling. This architecture lets developers focus on agent logic instead of infrastructure.
